author: bharath.vedartham
content: You can try the above KT config with `ethpandaops/buildoor:builder-api-impl-gloas` image, need to get the code merged to main. Need to raise a PR against go-eth2-client

author: bharath.vedartham
content: with the `--builder-api-require-auth` flag enabled, buildoor always verifies the request auth. if you remove the flag you can bypass it

author: bharath.vedartham
content: please do share me a branch of your impl too! Would like to check it out and test it along with you!
